Localization.Description: Attempt to recompile a Java object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to recompile schema object {object.name} containing Java source code, class, or resource
User {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to recompile a schema object containing Java source code, class, or resource
User {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} recompiled a schema object containing Java source code, class, or resource
User {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} recompiled schema object {object.name} containing Java source code, class, or resource
